overall.description: A spaceship flies steadily over the curved surface of a planet against a vibrant red nebula backdrop in this game engine footage. The third-person camera follows the vessel as it leaves bright blue thruster trails while traversing the open expanse of space.

agents.ego_description: piloting a spaceship over a curved planetary surface, maintaining steady altitude with blue thrusters firing continuously

entered.detail: dark curved surface of a planet occupying the lower portion of the frame
vibrant red and orange nebula clouds filling the starry sky backdrop
dense field of stars scattered across the red nebula sky

segments.scene_description: The spaceship maintains a steady cruise over the curved horizon of a dark planet, set against a striking red nebula filled with stars. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the ship's blue thruster trails glow against the warm-colored cosmic backdrop, with no other objects or changes in the environment throughout the continuous flight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a spaceship cruises steadily over the curved horizon of a dark planet against a vibrant cosmic backdrop. It begins with the vessel gliding smoothly through the void, its bright blue thruster trails creating a sharp contrast against the deep tones of the planetary surface. As the ship maintains its trajectory, the camera tracks from behind, emphasizing the vast scale of the surrounding red nebula filled with distant stars. The scene remains focused on this steady flight, with the warm glow of the nebula consistently framing the ship's path across the open expanse of space.
